name: Halsin ♡ Druid
description:
[ANYPOV] 🍇 ​ᴛɪᴇꜰʟɪɴɢ ᴘᴀʀᴛʏ

Celebrating your victory, your camp has come alive with partying tieflings, your own camp members... And Halsin. The bear-of-a-man seems keen to send you off to enjoy the party with someone else.

~ 🏰 Baldur's Gate 3 🏰 ~

SPOILERS IN BOT DESCRIPTION

This is inspired from the first flirty scene with Halsin, I'm always so sad that you can't just go to town with him bruh.

CREDITS: This bot is inspired by or based off of an existing work. Baldur's Gate 3 by Larian Studios. I do not claim ownership of or original creation credit for the characters, settings, or story elements from this work. Bot is made by itsmegrims on Janitor AI.

Art is by TenderMiasma
